item.title: I Ranked Relationship Nicknames: Only No. 1 Matters
item.description: “Babe,” “baby,” “love”… the list goes on. But when it comes down to it, there’s only one nickname that stands above the rest. Here’s my definitive ranking.

media:content.media:title: I Ranked Relationship Nicknames: Only No. 1 Matters
media:content.media:description: “Babe,” “baby,” “love”… the list goes on. But when it comes down to it, there’s only one nickname that stands above the rest. Here’s my definitive ranking.

item.title: Trendy Going-Out Tops Every College Student Needs
item.description: A great top can transform your entire outfit. These trendy picks are perfect for parties, dinners, and everything in between without sacrificing comfort or style.

media:content.media:title: Trendy Going-Out Tops Every College Student Needs
media:content.media:description: A great top can transform your entire outfit. These trendy picks are perfect for parties, dinners, and everything in between without sacrificing comfort or style.

item.title: I Booked a Window Seat… and Faced a Wall Instead
item.description: Budget airlines can come with surprises, but this one was unexpected. After paying extra for a view, I learned a lesson about seat maps the hard way. Safe to say I want my $34 back.

media:content.media:title: I Booked a Window Seat… and Faced a Wall Instead
media:content.media:description: Budget airlines can come with surprises, but this one was unexpected. After paying extra for a view, I learned a lesson about seat maps the hard way. Safe to say I want my $34 back.

item.title: Play a Hole With Me at Kapalua in Maui
item.description: Join me for a full play-through of a scenic par 4 at one of Maui’s most iconic golf destinations. From tee shot to final putt, here’s what the experience is really like on the course.

media:content.media:title: Play a Hole With Me at Kapalua in Maui
media:content.media:description: Join me for a full play-through of a scenic par 4 at one of Maui’s most iconic golf destinations. From tee shot to final putt, here’s what the experience is really like on the course.
